front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A — plugin self-development (stdlib-only Python installer + daemon glue + Markdown command + structural/unit tests). No frontend/backend runs at build time; the daemon's real network + LLM are adapter boundaries tested offline via StaticSource + FakeLLMClient + a fake env.

scenarios: command file invokes the installer polyglot
acceptance_criteria: commands/librarian-install.md runs install_librarian.py under python3||python and mirrors mempalace-install structure

scenarios: installer imports only the standard library at module load
the daemon module is runnable and wires the scheduler
acceptance_criteria: daemon loads config+registry, builds Librarian, registers ServiceTask per topic, runs scheduler (bounded ticks in test)
UrlSource fetches via urllib; unreachable/error URLs are logged + skipped, tick does not crash

entries.spec_requirement_id: librarian-install/Configurable LLM with honest degraded fallback
scenarios: the active LLM mode is reported
acceptance_criteria: Anthropic adapter when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY resolves else FakeLLMClient; mode named in output

scenarios: missing key blocks enable and prints remediation
acceptance_criteria: no key => state+descriptor provisioned, daemon NOT enabled, --enable remediation printed, no 'running/deployed' wording
~/.architect-team/librarian/ with config.json/topics.json/bodies/metadata; base dir injectable for tests

entries.spec_requirement_id: librarian-install/Per-OS boot descriptor with printed register hint
scenarios: descriptor is written and the register hint is printed not run
acceptance_criteria: install --enable writes the per-OS descriptor naming the daemon and PRINTS (never executes) the register hint
add-topic/list-topics/remove-topic round-trip topics.json; daemon builds one task per topic

scenarios: run-once executes a full cycle offline in tests
uninstall removes the descriptor and optionally purges state
acceptance_criteria: run-once does fetch->extract->index->metadata offline reporting per-topic counts; status reports health; uninstall removes descriptor, --purge removes state
plugin core stdlib-only at module load; check_separation() passes including the new daemon.py; no overclaimed deployment wording

scenarios: the suite is green and the version is bumped
acceptance_criteria: new tests pass; existing librarian/common tests green; plugin.json + marketplace.json bumped; CHANGELOG entry added
